title: From AI Chip Shortage to Record: Micron (MU) Closes at All-Time High
text: Micron Technology has achieved a landmark milestone, reaching an all-time high stock price. The company's remarkable ascent stems from a perfect storm of favorable earnings across the semiconductor sector, driven largely by surging demand for memory chips used in artificial intelligence applications. The stock has demonstrated exceptional performance, gaining approximately 690% over the past year as the firm transitions away from earlier supply constraints. This surge reflects broader momentum in the semiconductor industry, where companies are capitalizing on the explosive growth in AI-related computing requirements. The rally underscores how memory chip manufacturers have pivoted from facing shortage concerns to experiencing robust profitability as data centers and tech companies expand their AI infrastructure investments.
